epigraph.quote: They hung our coats to dry during supper.

moments.quote: Going to brush teeth with him, we discussed the flowers, the sheep, the gravel v. grass path, that one woman who asked me the time didn't have a watch
We bought lamb-chops, anticipating a barbeque + Thomas a pair of sandals.
Just as Thomas + Eve finished getting lunch ready, it started to rain, + has not really stopped for over 24 hours.
We drove home via Powys Castle, which turned out to be closed
We drove home via Powys Castle, which turned out to be closed, + Montgomery,
